zh.lifeSummary: Henry De Honeford於大約1235年出生在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特。他於大約1274年與Juliana Cornhill在英國英格蘭爾韓德福斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1294年在英國英格蘭爾韓德福斯享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Honeford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English, N Irish: locative name; the lack of early bearers before the 17th century suggests that it may be a euphemistic variant of Hungerford . The Honeyfield examples are also late and those for Honyfold only slightly earlier, but these names are clearly related to Honeyford.

variants.name: Honeyfield
meanings: English: perhaps a variant or, as Honyfold, a precursor of Honeyford .

variants.name: Hungerford
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry De Honeford was born about 1235, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Juliana Cornhill about 1274, in Handforth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1294, in Handforth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: Highley St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Henry De Honeford est né environ 1235, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Juliana Cornhill environ 1274, à Handforth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1294, à Handforth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1294 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Handforth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De Honefordは約1235年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで生まれた。約1274年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハンドフォースでJuliana Cornhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1294年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハンドフォースで61歳で死去した。

ko.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 히리 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Honeford(은)는 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 핸드포스에서 Juliana Cornhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 핸드포스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: хаили ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Henry De Honeford родился около 1235 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Cornhill около 1274 г. в местности хандфорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1294 г. в местности хандфорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
